rows.label: tev055501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Chikochiko for his thoughts on friendship treaties with xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Chikochiko about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Nopon business booming ever
since human friends agreed
to sign friendship treaty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0002
rows.name:
Bananaleaf from Nightglow Forest so popular
in city that some Nopon in Dodonga Caravan
sell enough in one day to buy new house![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Chikochiko decide to move
here to get in on action.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0004
rows.name:
But lots of Nopon have same
idea, so city quickly turning
into merchant battleground.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Chikochiko need to cook up get-rich-quick
idea that no other Nopon think of.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0008
rows.name:
Chikochiko decided to approach
Ma-non named Noborata to research
hit products in city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0009
rows.name:
But Noborata still not return on investment.
All Noborata ever talk about is "cultural
exchange." ...More like cultural rip-off! Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Chikochiko should have known better than to
trust lazy Ma-non. Maybe Chikochiko not cut
out for cutthroat business world after all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Chikochiko about business.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Chikochiko about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Everyone so eager to join BLADE,
Chikochiko decide to look into perks.
Best not to leave any money on table![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Sure enough, BLADEs get paid for lots of things!
Taking jobs at Quest Board... Setting data probes...
Punching enemies in face and then selling loot...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0013
rows.name:
But most profitable jobs usually
come directly from other friends
who need assistance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0014
rows.name: Just like friend did for Min'barac.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0015
rows.name:
So basically, miserable people source of
income for all BLADE friends. Chikochiko
never look at city same way again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0018
rows.name:
Chikochiko totally 100 percent
behind friends joining BLADE
and making easy money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0019
rows.name:
But why do friends have to keep
digging into pockets of Chikochiko?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0020
rows.name:
Selia want only most expensive weapons.
Nearly bankrupt poor Chikochiko![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0021
rows.name:
And Noborata taking out massive
loan to develop new gear![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055501_MSG0022
rows.name:
Chikochiko scared for future. Never
knew biggest threat to livelihood
was going to be best friends...[ST:wait ]
